goal: Add renderer-neutral viewport animation scheduling, double-click zoom planning, conformance trace coverage, and closeout docs while keeping timers and renderer smoke outside jellyflow-runtime.
checkpoints: after JVAS-020 pure animation planner tests pass
after JVAS-030 double-click zoom tests pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer or platform dependency required inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
existing immediate viewport pan/zoom behavior changes without an intentional test update
raw platform double-click detection enters runtime
runtime needs to own timers or event loops
scope expands into exact d3 interpolateZoom parity or adapter renderer smoke tests
